detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use i3c driver.

sect1.title: xi3c_polled_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XI3c driver directly. This example performs the writes/reads in polled mode using the driver.

sect1.title: xi3c_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XI3c driver directly. This example performs the writes/reads in interrupt mode using the driver.

sect1.title: xi3c_daa_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XI3c driver directly. This example performs the dynamic address assignment and writes/reads in polled mode using the driver.
